expectations.text: A .services.yml file exists that registers a custom service with `arguments:` containing at least one @-prefixed core service reference (e.g., @entity_type.manager)
expectations.evidence: user_activity.services.yml line 4: arguments: ['@entity_type.manager', '@database'] -- contains two @-prefixed core service references.

expectations.text: Route parameter is named `{user}` (matching the entity type machine name) for automatic entity upcasting -- the controller does NOT manually call User::load() or \Drupal\user\Entity\User::load()
expectations.evidence: user_activity.routing.yml line 2: path: '/user/{user}/activity' with options.parameters.user.type: entity:user (lines 9-11). Controller uses UserInterface $user type-hint and grep for 'User::load' in the controller returned no matches.

expectations.text: Route file defines `_title_callback` pointing to a controller method for dynamic page title (not just a static `_title` string)
expectations.evidence: user_activity.routing.yml line 5: _title_callback: '\Drupal\user_activity\Controller\UserActivityController::title' -- points to the title() method defined at Controller line 94.

expectations.text: Controller injects the custom service via create() factory method -- the service is pulled from the container by its module-prefixed name (e.g., user_activity.something)
expectations.evidence: UserActivityController.php lines 36-40: create() method calls $container->get('user_activity.activity_service') which is the module-prefixed service name.

expectations.text: The custom service class does NOT extend ControllerBase -- it is a standalone class with constructor injection via .services.yml arguments
expectations.evidence: UserActivityService.php line 12: 'class UserActivityService' -- no extends clause. Constructor at line 36 accepts EntityTypeManagerInterface and Connection via DI. services.yml provides these via arguments: ['@entity_type.manager', '@database'].

expectations.text: Routes use `_permission` for access control (not `_access: 'TRUE'` which bypasses all access checking)
expectations.evidence: user_activity.routing.yml line 7: _permission: 'view user activity' for user_activity.page route, and line 18: _permission: 'view user activity' for user_activity.json route. No _access: 'TRUE' found anywhere.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en user_activity -y returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en user_activity -y returned '[notice] Already installed: user_activity' (exit 0). ddev drush pm-list confirms 'User Activity (user_activity) Enabled'.

expectations.text: E2E: curl to /user/1/activity as authenticated admin returns HTTP 200 with page content (not 404 or 403)
expectations.evidence:
curl -sk -b cookies.txt https://d10-routing-with.ddev.site/user/1/activity returned HTTP 200. Page content includes 'Activity for admin | Drush Site-Install', '

Activity for admin

', and '
